name: Hockey Taka
author: Poki
description: Hockey Taka is a sports game that puts a new twist on classic ice hockey! Hit the ice, play thrilling matches, and climb your way through exciting tournaments. Outsmart your opponents, score goals, and lead your team to victory. Can you become the ultimate hockey champion? How to play Hockey Taka? Click and hold to aim, release to shoot. Who created Hockey Taka? Hockey Taka is created by KHeneidy. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Hockey Taka for free? You can play Hockey Taka for free on Poki. Can I play Hockey Taka on mobile devices and desktop? Hockey Taka can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
